name: codex-cli-qq
description: QQ C2C/group bridge for Codex CLI with session management, progress updates, attachments, and self-hosted long-running service support.
author: ankadada

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/context-compaction.js && node --check src/text-splitter.js && node --check src/session-history.js && node --check src/quick-actions.js && node --check src/workspace-git.js && node --check src/workspace-artifacts.js && node --check src/help-message.js && node --check src/text-shortcuts.js && node --check src/gateway-resilience.js && node --check src/pending-actions.js && node --check src/image-ocr.js && node --check src/doctor-report.js && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && bash -n scripts/*.sh
